content.full_text:
State of California
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. BOX 807 • SACRAMENTO, 95804 • • • 1100 K STREET BUILDING, SACRAMENTO, 95814

November 1, 1976


Mr. Scott T. Carey
180 University Avenue
Palo Alto, CA 94301

Re: Opinion Request
No. 76-087

Dear Mr. Carey:

     Thank you for your letter of October 15, 1976,
indicating that you now own ten percent of the outstanding
stock of Cornish & Carey and requesting an opinion with
respect to whether, and under what circumstances, you will
have to disclose the names of clients from whom the firm of
Cornish & Carey receives fees of which your pro rata share
will be $1,000 or more.

     This letter is to inform you that the Commission
will issue an opinion in response to the question you have
asked. The Commission reserves the right to request addi-
tional information which the Commission or its staff deems
relevant to the preparation of the opinion. A proposed
draft opinion will be prepared by the staff for presentation
to the Commission and a copy of this draft opinion will be
forwarded to you as soon as it is available.

     If you have any questions, please contact Kenneth
Finney, Chief of the Commission's Legal Division.

Sincerely,


Michael Bennett
Executive Director

MB:KF:plh


TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE/ADMINISTRATION (916) 322-5660 • EXECUTIVE/LEGAL 322-5901 • ENFORCEMENT/CONFLICT OF INTEREST 322-6441
